en.Name: D22 Hotel
en.Content: ["D22 Mini Apartment is a modern and youthful apartment, with the most striking feature being its bright and sunny spaces filled with greenery throughout the home.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-05.png"}, "The D22 mini apartment features a facade that combines modern and traditional styles, using decorative wind bricks to create highlights for the building", "Located in Thủ Đức City (central District 9), the apartment embodies the youthful and modern spirit of the city. Moreover, it is designed with minimalist lines and a dominant white color scheme, providing a cool atmosphere that alleviates the heat of the South. The construction materials used for the D22 apartment, such as concrete, bricks, stone, and wooden boards, are readily available in the market.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-06.png"}, "The D22 mini apartment includes separate entrances for residential tenants and office renters.", "One of the special features of the D22 apartment is the abundance of natural light that fills the home's spaces. The design cleverly incorporates a skylight in the center of the house along with the staircase, and balconies for all rooms to welcome natural sunlight. Natural light also seeps into the interior through the front porch and the backyard garden. To achieve this concept, large glass doors were used for the main entrance, and hollow spaces were created on the side walls of the building.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-04.png"}, "Utilizing wind bricks and glass, along with hollow side wall designs, optimizes sunlight and airflow into the apartment.", "The D22 mini apartment is a combination of several small modern homes with simple lines. The warm sunlight and cool breezes within the apartment create an inspiring environment for clients who value privacy yet desire openness.", "Some images:", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-04.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-05.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-06.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-07.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-08.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-09.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-10.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-11.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-12.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-13.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-14.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-15.png"}]

zh.Name: D22酒店
zh.Content: ["D22迷你公寓是一套风格现代年轻的公寓，最令人印象深刻的是室内洒满暖阳、绿意盎然的空间贯穿全屋。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-05.png"}, "D22迷你公寓的立面将现代与传统相结合，采用花窗砖为建筑增添亮点。", "D22迷你公寓坐落于守德市（原第九郡中心），因此整栋建筑散发着如同这座城市一样年轻而现代的气息。不仅如此，房屋以简约的线条和以白色为主的色调进行设计，营造出清凉感，减轻了南部地区的酷热。Nicon在D22公寓施工中使用的材料也都是市场上容易取得的，如混凝土、砖块、石材、木板等。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-06.png"}, "D22迷你公寓设有独立的住宅租户入口和办公租户入口。", "D22公寓的独特之处在于自然光洒满了整栋建筑的空间。Nicon巧妙地在房屋中央设置了天井并与楼梯相结合，同时为每个房间都设置了阳台以迎接自然光线。自然光还通过前廊和后花园渗透进屋内。为实现这一构想，Nicon在正面出入口采用了大面积玻璃门，并在建筑侧面开凿了镂空造型。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-04.png"}, "采用花窗砖与玻璃材料，结合建筑侧面的镂空设计，为建筑优化采光与通风。", "D22迷你公寓是多栋小型住宅的组合，风格现代年轻、线条简洁。屋内洒满暖阳、清风徐徐的空间，将为追求私密性同时又喜爱通透感的客户带来灵感。", "部分实景图：", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-04.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-05.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-06.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-07.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-08.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-09.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-10.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-11.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-12.png"}, "每间公寓都设有迷你阳台，为居住空间引入阳光与清风。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-13.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-14.png"}, "每间公寓的基础内装", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-15.png"}, "每个房间的基础卫生间"]

ja.Name: D22ホテル
ja.Content: ["D22ミニアパートメントはモダンで若々しいスタイルのアパートで、最も印象的なのは家全体に降り注ぐ暖かな陽光と緑豊かな空間です。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-05.png"}, "D22ミニアパートメントのファサードは、風通しの良い花柄ブロックを用いることで建物にアクセントを与え、モダンと伝統を融合させています。", "D22ミニアパートメントはトゥードゥック市（旧9区中心部）に位置しており、この街そのものが持つ若々しくモダンな精神を建物にも宿しています。さらに、シンプルなラインと白を基調とした配色でデザインされており、南部の暑さを和らげる涼しげな雰囲気を生み出しています。Niconが D22アパートメントの施工に使用した材料も、コンクリート、レンガ、石材、木製パネルなど、市場で容易に入手できるものばかりです。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-06.png"}, "D22ミニアパートメントには、居住用テナント専用の門と、オフィス用テナント専用の門が設けられています。", "D22アパートメントの特別な点は、自然光が住空間全体に降り注ぐことです。Niconは家の中央に階段と組み合わせたトップライトを巧みに配置し、すべての部屋にバルコニーを設けて自然光を取り込めるようにしました。自然光はまた、前面のポーチと裏庭を通じて室内へと入り込みます。このアイデアを実現するため、Niconは正面出入口に大きなガラス扉を採用し、建物側面には抜き窓を設けました。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-04.png"}, "風通しの良い花柄ブロックとガラス素材を用い、建物側面の抜き窓デザインと組み合わせることで、採光と通風を最適化しています。", "D22ミニアパートメントは、シンプルな線を持つモダンで若々しいスタイルの小さな住まいが集まって構成されています。暖かな陽光と涼しい風に満ちた空間は、プライバシーを重視しながらも開放感を求める顧客にインスピレーションを与えることでしょう。", "実景写真：", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-04.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-05.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-06.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-07.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-08.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-09.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-10.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-11.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-12.png"}, "各住戸にはミニバルコニーが設けられ、居住スペースに陽光と風を取り込んでいます。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-13.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-14.png"}, "各住戸の基本的な内装", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-o-d22/img-15.png"}, "各部屋の基本的な浴室・トイレ"]

en.Name: Trimas Vietnam Factory
en.Content: ["SUCCESS OF THE TRIMAS VIETNAM PROJECT – NICON’S CULTURE AND SPIRIT", "In every Design & Build project, technology and engineering serve as the essential foundation to realize ideas. However, it is people who ultimately determine success. At the TriMas Vietnam Factory project, the NICON team demonstrated professionalism, responsibility and creativity throughout every phase—from concept design, construction permitting and on-site execution to project completion and handover.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-01.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-02.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-03.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-04.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-05.png"}, "Each individual and each department contributed with dedication, expertise and strong teamwork, forming a united, flexible and committed organization working toward a shared goal.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-06.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-07.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-08.png"}, "The success of the TriMas project is not merely a construction delivered on schedule and with high quality; it is also a clear reflection of NICON’s work culture—where responsibility, credibility and wholehearted commitment are always prioritized.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-09.png"}, "More than just a construction contractor, NICON is a trusted partner who shares the client’s vision, builds confidence and accompanies them toward long-term sustainable growth.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-10.png"}, "𝑵𝑰𝑪𝑶𝑵 - 𝑷𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒏𝒆𝒓 𝒐𝒇 𝑫𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒑𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒕"]

zh.Name: TRIMAS越南工厂
zh.Content: ["TriMas越南项目的成功——NICON的文化与精神", "在每一个设计施工总承包（Design & Build）项目中，技术与工艺都是将构想变为现实的重要基础。然而，真正决定项目成功与否的关键因素始终是人。", "在TriMas越南工厂项目中，NICON团队在每个阶段都充分展现了专业、负责、富有创造力的精神——从概念设计、报建审批、现场施工，到竣工验收与项目交付。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-01.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-02.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-03.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-04.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-05.png"}, "每一位成员、每一个部门都倾注全部热忱、专业知识与团队精神，共同凝聚成一支团结、灵活并始终坚守共同目标的团队。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-06.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-07.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-08.png"}, "TRIMAS项目的成功，不仅仅在于工程按期高质量完工，更是NICON工作文化的有力见证——在这里，责任感、信誉与用心始终被放在首位。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-09.png"}, "NICON不仅是一家建筑承包商，更是值得信赖的同行伙伴，与客户共享愿景、建立信任，携手迈向长期可持续发展。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-10.png"}, "𝑵𝑰𝑪𝑶𝑵 - 𝑷𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒏𝒆𝒓 𝒐𝒇 𝑫𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒑𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒕"]

ja.Name: トライマスベトナム工場
ja.Content: ["TriMasベトナムプロジェクトの成功——NICONの文化と精神", "あらゆるDesign & Build（設計施工一括）プロジェクトにおいて、テクノロジーと技術力はアイデアを実現するための重要な基盤となります。しかし、成功を左右する真の決め手となるのは、あくまで「人」です。", "TriMasベトナム工場プロジェクトにおいて、NICONチームはコンセプト設計、建築許可申請、現場施工から竣工・引き渡しに至るすべての段階で、プロフェッショナリズム、責任感、そして創造性を明確に発揮しました。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-01.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-02.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-03.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-04.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-05.png"}, "一人ひとり、そして各部門が情熱と専門知識、チームワークを尽くして取り組み、結束力があり柔軟で、共通の目標に対して揺るぎない組織を作り上げました。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-06.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-07.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-08.png"}, "TRIMASプロジェクトの成功は、単に工期通りに高品質な建物を完成させたということにとどまりません。それは、責任感・信頼性・真摯な姿勢を何よりも重んじるNICONの企業文化を如実に物語るものでもあります。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-09.png"}, "NICONは単なる建設請負業者ではなく、お客様とビジョンを共有し、信頼を築きながら、長期的で持続可能な発展を共に目指す、信頼できるパートナーです。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/thanh-cong-cua-du-an-trimas-viet-nam-van-hoa-va-tinh-than-nicon/img-10.png"}, "𝑵𝑰𝑪𝑶𝑵 - 𝑷𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒏𝒆𝒓 𝒐𝒇 𝑫𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒑𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒕"]

en.Name: S.T.FOOD Marketing Factory in Vietnam
en.Content: ["S.T.FOOD Marketing Factory in Vietnam", "Client: S.T.FOOD MARKETING Vietnam Co., Ltd", "Location: Road 24, VSIP II-A, Tan Uyen Town, Binh Duong Province", "Project Scale: 20,000 m²", "Contract: Design and Build", "S.T.FOOD FACTORY AND THE INDUSTRIAL FACTORY DESIGN TREND", "The STFood Company factory at VSIP II IP, designed and built by Nicon, is clear evidence of progress in modern industrial architecture. The building not only meets the demands of efficient food production but also reflects creativity in integrating technology and sustainability into architectural design.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-10.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-17.png"}, "Overview of S.T.Food Vietnam Factory", "Architectural Design and Technology", "Design Overview", "The STFood Company factory was designed with the primary goal of optimizing production processes and improving operational efficiency. Built on a 2-hectare site, the building comprises multiple functional zones, from production lines and raw-material storage to office areas and product R&D spaces.", "The factory's architecture focuses on minimalism and modernity. The warehouse and workshop blocks are laid out scientifically, minimizing travel distance between different areas and improving traffic-flow efficiency. In addition, the office block serves as a highlight of the factory within the industrial park, combining large glass panels that not only enhance natural lighting but also create a connection with the surrounding environment.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-11.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-12.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-05.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-06.png"}, "Production and operation spaces of the factory and office", "2. Materials, Construction Techniques, and Sustainability", "One of the highlights of the factory's design is the use of sustainable materials and advanced construction technology. The wall and roof systems are made of insulation materials that meet the standards required for a food factory, helping to reduce energy consumption and maintain a stable temperature throughout the year.", "The large glass window system not only makes the most of natural light but also creates a bright and airy working environment. In addition, the warehouse and workshop areas are fully equipped with ridge ventilators and translucent roofing/wall panels, ensuring good airflow and lighting and saving energy once the facility is in operation.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-18.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-19.png"}, "The STFood Company factory at VSIP II IP is not only a modern production facility but also a testament to innovation in industrial architectural design. zh.Name: 越南 S.T.FOOD 营销工厂
zh.Content: ["越南S.T.FOOD营销工厂", "客户：越南S.T.FOOD MARKETING有限公司", "地点：平阳省Tân Uyên镇VSIP II-A工业园24号路", "项目规模：20,000平方米", "合同类型：设计与施工", "S.T.FOOD工厂与工业厂房设计趋势", "位于VSIP II工业园的STFood Company工厂由Nicon设计并施工，是现代工业建筑设计进步的有力证明。该建筑不仅满足高效食品生产的需求，也体现了在建筑设计中融合科技与可持续理念的创造力。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-10.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-17.png"}, "越南S.T.Food工厂概览", "建筑设计与技术", "设计概览", "STFood Company工厂的设计以优化生产流程、提升运营效率为主要目标。项目占地2公顷，涵盖生产线、原料仓储，以及办公与产品研发等多个功能区域。", "工厂的建筑设计注重简约与现代感。仓库与车间区块经过科学规划，最大限度缩短了各区域间的移动距离，也提升了动线效率。此外，办公楼是该工厂在工业园区内的一大亮点，大面积玻璃幕墙的运用不仅增强了自然采光，也让建筑与周边环境产生了联系。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-11.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-12.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-05.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-06.png"}, "工厂与办公区的生产及运营空间", "2. 材料使用、施工技术与可持续性", "工厂设计的一大亮点是采用了可持续材料与先进的施工技术。墙体与屋面系统采用符合食品工厂标准的保温材料，有助于降低能耗，并全年维持稳定的室内温度。", "大面积玻璃窗系统不仅充分利用了自然采光，也营造出明亮通透的工作环境。此外，仓库与车间区域配备了完善的屋脊通风系统与采光板（墙面与屋面均有），确保通风采光顺畅，并在投入运营后更加节能。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-18.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-19.png"}, "位于VSIP II工业园的STFood Company工厂，不仅是一座现代化的生产基地，更是工业建筑设计创新的见证。作为总承包商，我们自豪的不仅是建造出坚固的建筑，更是打造出充满灵感的生活与工作空间。", "部分实景图：", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-10.png"}, {"type": "image", ja.Name: S.T.FOODマーケティング工場（ベトナム）
ja.Content: ["S.T.FOODマーケティング工場（ベトナム）", "顧客：S.T.FOOD MARKETINGベトナム有限会社", "所在地：ビンズオン省タンウエン町VSIP II-A工業団地24号通り", "プロジェクト規模：20,000 m²", "契約形態：設計・施工", "S.T.FOOD工場と工業工場デザインのトレンド", "VSIP II工業団地に位置するSTFood Company工場は、Niconが設計・施工を手掛け、現代の工業建築デザインにおける進歩を明確に示す好例です。この建物は効率的な食品生産のニーズを満たすだけでなく、テクノロジーと持続可能性を建築デザインに融合させる創造性も体現しています。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-10.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-17.png"}, "S.T.Foodベトナム工場の概要", "建築デザインとテクノロジー", "デザイン概要", "STFood Company工場は、生産プロセスの最適化と運用効率の向上を主な目標として設計されました。敷地面積2ヘクタールに、生産ライン、原材料倉庫からオフィスエリア、製品研究開発エリアまで、複数の機能ゾーンが配置されています。", "工場の建築デザインは、ミニマルさとモダンさを重視しています。倉庫・作業棟は科学的にレイアウトされ、各エリア間の移動距離を最小限に抑えるとともに、動線効率を高めています。さらに、オフィス棟は工業団地内における工場のハイライトとなっており、大きなガラス面を多用することで自然採光を強化するとともに、周囲の環境とのつながりを生み出しています。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-11.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-12.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-05.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-06.png"}, "工場とオフィスの生産・運用スペース", "2. 使用材料、施工技術と持続可能性", "工場デザインの特徴の一つは、持続可能な素材と先進的な施工技術の採用です。壁面および屋根システムには、食品工場に求められる基準を満たす断熱材が使用されており、エネルギー消費の削減と年間を通じた安定した室温の維持に貢献しています。", "大きなガラス窓システムは自然光を最大限に活用するだけでなく、明るく風通しの良い作業環境を生み出します。さらに、倉庫・作業エリアには棟換気システムと採光パネル（壁面・屋根面双方）が十分に配置されており、通風と採光を確保しながら、稼働後の省エネルギーにも貢献しています。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-18.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/stfood-marketing-factory-vn/img-19.png"}, "VSIP II工業団地にあるSTFood Company工場は、単なる近代的な生産拠点であるだけでなく、工業建築デザインにおける革新の証でもあります。私たちは、総合請負業者として、堅牢な建物を建設するだけでなく、インスピレーションに満ちた生活・仕事空間を創造することを誇りとしています。", "実景写真：", {"type": "image", "url": en.Name: B37 Office
en.Content: ["B37 OFFICE AND OPEN SPACES - THE TREND IN MODERN ARCHITECTURE", "Today, open space design has become a trend and the future of modern architecture. This design style creates spacious, airy living environments that offer a sense of closeness to the surrounding environment. In the following text, I will provide solutions for designing spaces in the most impressive open style.", "The office facade uses glass and extends to the ceiling to create a modern and airy effect.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-18.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-02.jpg"}, "Ceiling-to-floor windows create an open and airy space.", "Open Lobby Design: A Trend in Modern Design", "Open spaces are often understood as the integration of functional areas within a seamless space, without being divided by traditional partitions. Instead of separate rooms, Nicon has connected the space to create a wide and flexible environment.", "One of the main features of open spaces is the use of design elements to optimize natural light and airflow. Large windows, sliding doors, and smart design elements help maximize light and views, creating a closer connection with nature.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-03.jpg"}, "Office Lobby B37", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-04.jpg"}, "Relocating restrooms and stairs to the back of the building to maintain continuous and spacious usage", "Benefits of Open Living Rooms", "Creates a Sense of Spaciousness: One of the biggest benefits of open spaces is the feeling of expansiveness they provide. When functional areas are not distinctly separated, the space becomes more open and comfortable, reducing the sense of being confined in small areas.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-28.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-06.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-29.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-30.png"}, "Encourages Social Interaction: Open spaces promote communication and connection among family members or groups. Removing partitions helps activities occur within the same space, facilitating interaction and social connection.", "Flexibility in Use: Open space design allows for easy changes in the function of areas depending on needs and situations. This helps optimize space and makes it more efficient.", "Natural Light Utilization: With the integration of large windows and open design elements, open spaces allow natural light to flood in, saving energy and creating a bright and pleasant living environment.", "Use of Large Glass Doors: This is the most commonly applied solution in architectural projects designed in the open style. Glass doors can be used for both entryways and windows. The transparent nature of glass does not block light, allowing your home to be bathed in natural light.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-09.jpg"}, "High ceiling glass doors create a feeling of spaciousness.", "Window and Ventilation Design: Open design can extend to common spaces and even to restrooms. Using frosted or one-way glass for restrooms can maintain privacy while creating a feeling of openness.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-20.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-11.jpg"}, "Restroom with one-way glass doors", "Skylights and Internal Corridors: Skylights are a convenient solution for bringing natural light and fresh air into the entire home. Additionally, homeowners can add green plants or decorative features in side corridors to create a refreshing and nature-friendly environment.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-12.jpg"}, "Skylight for basement lighting", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-13.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-14.jpg"}, "Side corridor of the office", "Arranging Items for Open Spaces", "To enhance the feeling of spaciousness, it is essential to include translucent or reflective materials. Based on this application, the architect has used glass and stainless steel for elevators and corridor railings.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-23.png"}, "Glass elevators and railings", "In addition to the aforementioned elements, in the B37 office building, Nicon has added several balconies on the facade and sides of the building to increase outdoor space for users.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-16.jpg"}, "B37 Office Balcony", "Some images:", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-17.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-18.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-19.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-20.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-21.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-22.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-23.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-24.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-25.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-26.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-27.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-28.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-29.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-30.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-31.png"}]

zh.Name: B37办公室
zh.Content: ["B37办公室与开放空间——现代建筑的趋势", "如今，开放空间设计已成为一种趋势，是现代建筑的未来方向。这种设计风格带来通透、宽敞的居住空间，营造出与周围环境紧密相连的感觉。在下文中，我们将为您介绍如何以最令人印象深刻的方式打造开放式空间的设计方案。", "办公室立面采用玻璃材质，配合通顶开窗，营造出现代通透的效果", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-18.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-02.jpg"}, "通顶门设计营造出开放通透的空间", "开放式接待大厅设计：现代设计的趋势", "开放空间通常被理解为在一个连贯的空间内整合各功能区域，不再被传统隔墙分割。Nicon没有采用各部门独立分隔的方式，而是将空间连通，营造出宽敞而灵活的环境。", "开放空间的主要特点之一，是运用各种设计元素来优化自然采光与空气流通。大面积窗户、推拉门以及巧妙的设计元素，最大限度地引入光线与户外视野，营造出亲近自然的感觉。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-03.jpg"}, "B37办公室的接待大厅", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-04.jpg"}, "将卫生间与楼梯设置在建筑末端，使使用空间保持连贯且宽敞", "开放式客厅空间的优势", "营造宽敞感：开放空间最大的优势之一，就是它所带来的宽敞感。当功能区域没有被明确分隔时，空间会变得更加通透舒适，减少狭小空间带来的局促感。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-28.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-06.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-29.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-30.png"}, "促进社交互动：开放空间促进了家庭成员或团体之间的交流与联系。取消隔墙使各项活动能够在同一空间内进行，为社交互动创造了条件。", "使用上的灵活性：开放空间设计使各区域的功能可以根据具体需求和情况轻松调整，从而优化空间配置，提高使用效率。", "充分利用自然采光：通过融入大面积窗户与开放式设计元素，开放空间能够引入充足的自然光线，有助于节约能源，并营造出明亮舒适的居住环境。", "- 采用大面积玻璃门系统：这是开放式风格建筑中最常用的设计方案。玻璃门可同时应用于出入口与窗户。玻璃材质具有通透、不阻挡光线的特性，能让房屋充满自然光线。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-09.jpg"}, "通顶式门的设计带来通透宽敞的感觉", "- 窗户与通风口设计：开放式设计不仅限于公共使用空间，也可应用于卫生间，采用磨砂玻璃或单向玻璃，既保证通风又能为房间带来宽敞感。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-20.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-11.jpg"}, "卫生间采用大面积单向玻璃门", "- 天井与室内走廊设计：天井设计是将自然光线与户外空气引入整栋建筑最便捷的方案。此外，业主还可以在侧廊种植绿植或布置小景观，营造清凉、贴近自然的空间。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-12.jpg"}, "为地下室采光而设的天井", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-13.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-14.jpg"}, "建筑侧廊", "开放空间的家具与陈设配置", "为使空间看起来更加通透宽敞，透光或反光材质的物件必不可少。基于这一应用原则，建筑师为电梯与走廊栏杆采用了玻璃与不锈钢材质。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-23.png"}, "玻璃电梯与栏杆", "除上述元素外，在B37办公楼项目中，Nicon还在建筑正立面与侧立面增设了多个阳台，为使用者增加了更多室外空间。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-16.jpg"}, "B37办公室阳台", "部分实景图：", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-17.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-18.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-19.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-20.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-21.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-22.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-23.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-24.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-25.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": ja.Name: B37オフィス
ja.Content: ["B37オフィスとオープンスペース——現代建築のトレンド", "今日、オープンスペースデザインはトレンドとなり、現代建築の未来を象徴するものとなっています。このデザインスタイルは、開放的でゆとりのある生活空間をもたらし、周囲の環境との一体感を生み出します。以下では、最も印象的な形でオープンスタイルの空間をデザインするための解決策をご紹介します。", "オフィスのファサードにはガラスを使用し、天井までの高窓を設けることで、モダンで開放的な効果を演出しています", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-18.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-02.jpg"}, "天井までの扉デザインが開放的な空間を生み出しています", "オープンエントランスホールのデザイン：現代デザインのトレンド", "オープンスペースとは一般に、従来の間仕切りで区切ることなく、機能エリアを一つの連続した空間に統合することを指します。Niconは各部門を個別の部屋に分けるのではなく、空間をつなげることで、広々とした柔軟な環境を作り出しました。", "オープンスペースの主な特徴の一つは、自然光と通気を最適化するためのデザイン要素の活用です。大きな窓、引き戸、そして工夫を凝らしたデザイン要素により、採光と外部への視界が最大化され、自然との一体感が生まれます。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-03.jpg"}, "B37オフィスのエントランスホール", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-04.jpg"}, "トイレと階段を建物の奥に配置することで、使用スペースを連続的で広々としたものにしています", "オープンリビングスペースのメリット", "広々とした印象を演出：オープンスペースの最大のメリットの一つは、それがもたらす広々とした感覚です。機能エリアが明確に区切られていないことで、空間はより開放的で快適になり、狭い空間による圧迫感を軽減します。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-28.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-06.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-29.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-30.png"}, "社会的交流の促進：オープンスペースは、家族やグループのメンバー間のコミュニケーションとつながりを促進します。間仕切りをなくすことで、さまざまな活動が同一空間内で行われ、社会的な交流とつながりが生まれやすくなります。", "利用における柔軟性：オープンスペースデザインにより、具体的なニーズや状況に応じて各エリアの機能を容易に変更できます。これにより、空間が最適化され、より効率的に活用できます。", "自然光の活用：大きな窓とオープンなデザイン要素を取り入れることで、オープンスペースには自然光がふんだんに差し込み、省エネルギーと明るく快適な生活環境の創出に貢献します。", "- 大型ガラス扉システムの採用：これはオープンスタイルの建築で最も広く採用されている手法です。ガラス扉は出入口・窓のいずれにも適用できます。ガラスは透明で光を遮らない特性を持つため、住まい全体に自然光を取り込むことができます。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-09.jpg"}, "天井まで届く扉の配置が、開放的で広々とした印象を生み出しています", "- 窓・通気口のデザイン：オープンデザインは共用スペースだけでなく、トイレにも適用可能です。すりガラスやマジックミラーガラスを使用することで、通気性を確保しながら部屋に広がりを感じさせます。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-20.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-11.jpg"}, "トイレには大型のマジックミラーガラス扉を採用", "- トップライトと内部廊下のデザイン：トップライトは、建物全体に自然光と外気を取り込むための最も便利な方法です。さらに、施主は側廊に緑の植物を植えたり、小さな造景を施したりすることで、涼しく自然に近い空間を演出できます。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-12.jpg"}, "地下階に採光をもたらすトップライト", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-13.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-14.jpg"}, "建物側面の廊下", "オープンスペースのための什器配置", "空間をより開放的で広く見せるためには、透過性や反射性のある素材の什器が欠かせません。この考え方に基づき、建築家はエレベーターと廊下の手すりにガラスとステンレス素材を採用しました。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-23.png"}, "ガラス製のエレベーターと手すり", "上記の要素に加え、B37オフィスプロジェクトでは、Niconは建物の正面および側面に複数のバルコニーを追加し、利用者のための屋外空間を増やしました。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-16.jpg"}, "B37オフィスのバルコニー", "実景写真：", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-17.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-18.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/nha-b37-2/img-19.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": en.Name: Red Bull's Expansion Project
en.Content: ["RED BULL AND ARCHITECTURAL DESIGN: REFLECTING BRAND SPIRIT", "Today, design that embodies brand spirit is a common practice among renowned brands to provide customers with a memorable and clear impression of their identity. In line with this need, the architect has delivered a new design for the expansion of the Red Bull factory while retaining the essence of the brand.", "Overview of the Red Bull Factory Project", "Facade Design", "The facade of the building features prominent brand-related characteristics, such as distinctive colors and shapes, with the logo strategically placed to create a focal point. The use of bold cuts and contrasting design details conveys the brand’s spirit of innovation and dynamism.", "Color in Design", "Color elements are closely tied to brand recognition. Here, the designer has used Red Bull's signature red for the large metal roofing of the factory, as well as accent lines on the office block’s facade.", "Materials and Construction Techniques", "The Red Bull factory's facade is crafted from modern, industrial materials such as glass and metal. These materials not only contribute to a sleek and sophisticated appearance but also ensure durability against the Southern climate.", "Glass: Large glass panels in the office areas optimize natural light and create an open and connected feeling with the surrounding environment. Glass also enhances the spacious and airy quality of the building.", "Metal: Metal details, such as cladding panels and structural frames, enhance stability and provide an industrial and contemporary look for the factory.", "Interior Design", "Integrating brand spirit into the space is not only an aesthetic element but also a crucial part of conveying the brand’s values and identity. Therefore, the interior of both the office and factory spaces at Red Bull consistently reflects the brand’s essence and color scheme.", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-02.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-03.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-04.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-05.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-06.png"}, "Some images:", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-07.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-08.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-09.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-09.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-10.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-11.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-12.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-13.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull/img-01.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull/img-02.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull/img-03.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull/img-04.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull/img-05.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull/img-06.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull/img-07.png"}]

zh.Name: 红牛工厂扩建项目
zh.Content: ["红牛与彰显品牌精神的设计", "如今，众多知名品牌都遵循能够体现品牌精神的设计理念，以便为客户留下深刻记忆并建立清晰的品牌形象。基于这一需求，建筑师为红牛工厂扩建项目带来了全新设计，同时保留了品牌本身的特质。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-01.png"}, "红牛工厂项目概览", "立面设计", "建筑立面呈现出与品牌相关的鲜明特征，如独特的色彩与形体元素，以及作为视觉焦点的标志位置。通过大胆的切割线条与对比强烈的设计细节，工厂立面展现出品牌创新而充满活力的精神。", "设计中的色彩", "色彩等要素与品牌识别息息相关。在本项目中，Nicon在厂房的大面积屋顶采用了红牛品牌标志性的红色，同时也将其用于办公楼立面的点缀线条。", "材料与施工技术", "红牛工厂的立面采用玻璃与金属等现代工业材料打造。这些材料不仅赋予建筑现代精致的外观，也确保了对南部气候条件的良好抵御能力。", "- 玻璃：办公区域采用大面积玻璃，不仅优化了自然采光，也营造出开放的空间感并与周边环境相连。玻璃还为建筑带来更宽敞通透的空间效果。", "- 金属：饰面板与结构框架等金属构件不仅增强了建筑的稳定性，也为工厂带来了工业化且现代的外观。", "设计中的室内空间", "将品牌精神融入空间，不仅是一种美学考量，更是传达品牌价值与身份认同的重要组成部分。因此，红牛办公室与工厂的室内设计始终贯彻着品牌的精神与色彩。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-02.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": ja.Name: レッドブル工場拡張プロジェクト
ja.Content: ["レッドブルとブランド精神を反映したデザイン", "今日、著名なブランドの多くは、顧客に自社ブランドについての明確な印象と記憶を残すため、ブランド精神を反映したデザインを採用しています。このニーズに応えるため、建築家はレッドブル工場拡張プロジェクトに新しいデザインを取り入れながらも、ブランドの本質を維持しました。", {"type": "image", "url": "/images/projects/mo-rong-nha-may-red-bull-2/img-01.png"}, "レッドブル工場プロジェクトの概要", "ファサードデザイン", "建物のファサードには、独自の色彩や造形要素、アクセントとなるロゴの配置など、ブランドに関連する際立った特徴が反映されています。大胆な切り込みラインとコントラストの効いたデザインディテールにより、工場のファサードはブランドの革新性とダイナミズムを表現しています。", "デザインにおける色彩", "色彩などの要素は、ブランド認知と密接に関わっています。本プロジェクトでは、Niconは工場棟の大屋根にレッドブルを象徴する赤を採用し、オフィス棟のファサードのアクセントラインにも同色を用いました。", "材料と施工技術", "レッドブル工場のファサードは、ガラスや金属といった現代的な工業素材で構成されています。これらの素材は、モダンで洗練された外観を実現するだけでなく、南部の気候条件への耐久性も確保しています。", "- ガラス：オフィスエリアに大きなガラス面を採用することで、自然採光を最適化するだけでなく、開放感を生み出し、周囲の環境とのつながりを演出しています。ガラスはまた、建物により広々とした開放的な空間をもたらします。", "- 金属：外装パネルや構造フレームなどの金属部材は、安定性を高めるだけでなく、工場に工業的でモダンな外観を与えています。", "デザインにおけるインテリア", "ブランド精神を空間に統合することは、美的要素であるだけでなく、ブランドの価値観とアイデンティティを伝える重要な要素でもあります。そのため、レッドブルのオフィスおよび工場のインテリアには、常にブランドの精神とカラーが反映されています。", {"type": "image", "url":
